title: Comer y estudiar · Food, school and useful actions
focus: A1 food, classroom vocabulary, simple actions, quantities and survival phrases.

words.example: Es importante saborear con calma.
words.example_en: It is important to savour; taste calmly.

words.example_en: I try to cut a little every day.

words.example_en: We have to mix before deciding.

words.example: Quiero servir mejor en situaciones reales.
words.example_en: I want to serve better in real situations.

words.example_en: I learned to wish; want during the course.

words.example_en: I am going to take a break after this exercise.

words.example: Cuando no entiendo el formulario, puedo pedir ayuda.
words.example_en: When I do not understand the form, I can ask for help.

words.example: Hablo un poco de español en la tienda.
words.example_en: I speak a little Spanish in the shop.

words.example: Un momento, voy a buscar mi cartera.
words.example_en: One moment, I am going to look for my wallet.

words.example: Necesito pan y otra cosa para la cena.
words.example_en: I need bread and one other thing for dinner.

words.example: ¿Puede hablar más despacio, por favor?
words.example_en: Can you speak more slowly, please?

words.example: ¿Puede hablar más alto? No oigo bien.
words.example_en: Can you speak louder? I cannot hear well.

words.example: Hable más bajo, el bebé está durmiendo.
words.example_en: Speak more quietly, the baby is sleeping.

words.example: Me parece una opción igual.
words.example_en: It seems like a same; equal option to me.

words.example: La situación es bastante distinto.
words.example_en: The situation is quite different.

words.example: El ejemplo es falso y fácil de recordar.
words.example_en: The example is false and easy to remember.

words.example: Es un tema verdadero para el examen.
words.example_en: It is a true topic for the exam.

words.example: Me parece una opción exacto.
words.example_en: It seems like a exact option to me.

words.example: La situación es bastante equivocado.
words.example_en: The situation is quite mistaken; wrong.

words.example: El ejemplo es fino y fácil de recordar.
words.example_en: The example is thin; fine and easy to remember.

words.example: Es un tema grueso para el examen.
words.example_en: It is a thick topic for the exam.

words.example: Me parece una opción redondo.

words.example: La situación es bastante cuadrado.
words.example_en: The situation is quite square.

words.example_en: The example is light; lightweight and easy to remember.

words.example_en: It is a heavy topic for the exam.

words.example: Me parece una opción principal.
words.example_en: It seems like a main option to me.

words.example: La situación es bastante simple.
words.example_en: The situation is quite simple.

words.example: El ejemplo es cada y fácil de recordar.
words.example_en: The example is each; every and easy to remember.

words.example: Es un tema otro para el examen.
words.example_en: It is a other; another topic for the exam.

words.example: Lo uso poco cuando hablo.
words.example_en: I use it little; not much when I speak.

words.example: La situación cambia mucho.
words.example_en: The situation changes a lot.

words.example_en: He or she answers sufficiently in the interview.
